title: line
text: line Execute a number of ProcScript statements, without called modules. Line { Number } Arguments Number —number of ProcScript instructions to execute, without stepping through called modules. If not specified, one ProcScript statement is executed. Description This command considers a call statement as a complete unit; the statements in the called module are not stepped trhough individually. Example: The following command executeds 10 ProcScript statements, treating any called modules as a unit. l 10 Copy Related Links step Execute a number of ProcScript statements.
